summary: Joel Spolsky shares a brief, lighthearted note that his book 'Joel on Software' makes a cameo appearance in the horror movie 1408, starring John Cusack and Samuel L. Jackson. The post is essentially a fun factoid with no technical content.
key_points: Joel's book 'Joel on Software' appears as a prop in the 2007 horror film 1408
The post is self-aware about being trivial, filing itself under 'interesting but ultimately useless facts'
money_quotes: There's a scene in the movie 1408 that features a stack of Joel on Software (the book) along with John Cusack and Samuel L. Jackson.
key_insight: Sometimes a blog post is just a fun personal aside — Joel's book made it into a Hollywood movie.
